name: Norma Miller
abstract: Norma Adele Miller (December 2, 1919 – May 5, 2019) was an American Lindy hop dancer, choreographer, actress, author, and comedian known as the "Queen of Swing".

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Whaley
about_quotes.evidence: she took me down to her lawyer... we came to terms, and so I started writing her music, writing the show.
